title: Youtube Poop: Reggie Changes the Title of This Video Again
description:
Out of the videos I made, this and Team Star Wolf Disbands are my least favorite.
Changed tags and spelling of a certain anime to keep this video from being removed by  a certain Japanese company

This video is 3 Youtube Poops in 1. 

Part 1: Lizard Spheres - Reggie vs. FrEEEZAAA 
Part 2: Megas XLR - The Sonic Quantum Singularity 
Part 3: Star Fox - Fox Becomes A Murderous Maniac 

Making a special guest appearance: Shigeru Miyamoto 

Video/Audio Used: 
E3 2004 Nintendo Press Conference 
Youtube Poop slogan thing 
E3 2007 Nintendo Press Conference 
Lizard Sphere 26th letter in the alphabet
Mega64: New Super Mario Bros. episode 
Super Smash Bros. Brawl 
Megas XLR 
Never Gonna Give You Up (Rick Roll) 
Thriller 
Robot Chicken 
Star Fox Assault 
That 70's Show 
Star Fox 64/Lylat Wars 
Scatman 
Lord of the Rings: Fellowship of the Ring
